jiraBaseUrl.description: Base URL of your Jira instance, e.g., https://your-domain.atlassian.net

issueKey.description: Issue key to check, e.g., ABC-123

userAccountId.description: Jira Cloud accountId to match against the issue assignee.fields.accountId

assigneeName.description: Jira username or displayName to match (useful for Server/DC or when accountId is unavailable)

userEmail.description: Assignee emailAddress to match (may be unavailable/redacted on Jira Cloud)

timeoutSeconds.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds before returning nothing (empty result)
